tempmon.alert.title: Hardware temperature too high
tempmon.alert.body: {0} reached {1}°C, above the {2}°C threshold. Please check cooling.
tempmon.tts.alert: Warning. {0} temperature is too high, currently {1} degrees Celsius. Please check cooling.
tempmon.tts.test: This is a temperature monitoring voice test.
tempmon.dlg.title: Sustained overheating
tempmon.dlg.body: {0} keeps overheating (currently {1}°C, threshold {2}°C). Stop reminding you about this device for this session? (The reminder frequency is managed in Settings → Hardware temperature monitor.)
